name: Iron Fist
description: Your unarmed attacks do more damage. Power fists, Deathclaw Gauntlets, and knuckles benefit from this perk.

ranks.description: Unarmed attacks do 20% more damage
Unarmed attacks do 40% more damage. 10% chance to disarm
Unarmed attacks do 60% more damage. 1% chance to cripple
Unarmed attacks do 80% more damage. 15% chance to disarm
Unarmed attacks do 100% more damage. 15% chance to disarm

name: Big Leagues
description: Your melee weapons do more damage. This affects all melee weapons except unarmed.

ranks.description: Melee weapons do 20% more damage
Melee weapons do 40% more damage. 10% chance to disarm
Melee weapons do 60% more damage. 15% chance to disarm and 10% chance to cripple
Melee weapons do 80% more damage. 15% chance to disarm and 10% chance to cripple
Melee weapons do 100% more damage. 15% chance to disarm and 10% chance to cripple

name: Armorer
description: You can craft and modify armor, including power armor. Unlock new armor mods at higher ranks.

ranks.description: You can craft and modify armor
You can craft and modify armor. Armor and Power Armor are 20% more effective
You can craft and modify armor. Armor and Power Armor are 40% more effective
You can craft and modify armor. Armor and Power Armor are 60% more effective

name: Blacksmith
description: You can craft and modify melee weapons. Damage boosts stack with Big Leagues.

ranks.description: You can craft and modify melee weapons
You can craft and modify melee weapons. Melee weapons are 25% more effective
You can craft and modify melee weapons. Melee weapons are 50% more effective
You can craft and modify melee weapons. Melee weapons are 75% more effective
You can craft and modify melee weapons. Melee weapons are 100% more effective

name: Heavy Gunner
description: Heavy guns do more damage and have a chance to stagger enemies.

ranks.description: Heavy guns do 20% more damage
Heavy guns do 40% more damage. 10% chance to stagger
Heavy guns do 60% more damage. 10% chance to stagger
Heavy guns do 80% more damage. 1.5% chance to stagger per bullet
Heavy guns do 100% more damage. 1.5% chance to stagger per bullet

name: Strong Back
description: Carry more weight and move while over-encumbered.

ranks.description: Carry weight increased by 25 lbs
Carry weight increased by 50 lbs
Carry weight increased by 75 lbs. You can move while over-encumbered
Carry weight increased by 100 lbs. You can move faster while over-encumbered

name: Steady Aim
description: Heavy guns have less recoil when hip-firing.

ranks.description: Heavy guns have 25% less recoil
Heavy guns have 50% less recoil
Heavy guns have 75% less recoil

name: Basher
description: Gun bashing does more damage.

ranks.description: Gun bashing does 25% more damage
Gun bashing does 50% more damage
Gun bashing does 75% more damage
Gun bashing does 100% more damage
Gun bashing does 125% more damage

name: Rooted
description: While standing still, gain damage and energy resistance.

ranks.description: While standing still, gain +25 Damage and Energy Resistance
While standing still, gain +50 Damage and Energy Resistance
While standing still, gain +75 Damage and Energy Resistance

name: Pain Train
description: Sprinting into enemies knocks them down and deals damage.

ranks.description: Sprinting into enemies knocks them down
Sprinting into enemies knocks them down and deals damage
Sprinting into enemies knocks them down and deals significant damage

name: Pickpocket
description: Steal items from people and creatures without being detected.

ranks.description: Pickpocket success increased by 25%
Pickpocket success increased by 50%
Pickpocket success increased by 75%
Pickpocket success doubled. Can pickpocket weapons and armor

name: Rifleman
description: Non-automatic rifles do more damage. Includes shotguns, laser rifles, and muskets.

ranks.description: Rifles do 20% more damage
Rifles do 40% more damage. 10% chance to cripple limbs
Rifles do 60% more damage. 10% chance to cripple limbs
Rifles do 80% more damage. 10% chance to cripple limbs
Rifles do 100% more damage. 10% chance to cripple limbs

name: Locksmith
description: Pick locks on safes, doors, and containers.

ranks.description: You can pick Novice locks
You can pick Advanced locks
You can pick Expert locks
You can pick Master locks. Bobby pins are easier to find

name: Awareness
description: See enemy health, components, and resistances in VATS.

ranks.description: In VATS, you can see enemy health and resistances (Damage, Energy, Radiation, Bleed)

name: Demolition Expert
description: Grenades, mines, and explosives do more damage and have larger blast radius.

ranks.description: Grenades and mines do 20% more damage
Grenades and mines do 40% more damage. You can see grenade trajectory
Grenades and mines do 60% more damage. Larger blast radius. Can craft explosives
Grenades and mines do 80% more damage. Larger blast radius. Explosions deal double damage when targeted in VATS

name: Night Person
description: Gain bonuses at night.

ranks.description: At night, gain +1 Intelligence and +1 Endurance. Gain +9% XP at night
At night, gain +2 Intelligence and +2 Endurance. Gain +9% XP at night

name: Refractor
description: Energy weapons ignore your armor less effectively.

ranks.description: You gain +10 Energy Resistance
You gain +20 Energy Resistance
You gain +30 Energy Resistance
You gain +40 Energy Resistance
You gain +50 Energy Resistance

name: Sniper
description: Scoped weapons are more effective.

ranks.description: Scoped weapons have 25% less AP cost when holding breath
Scoped weapons have 50% less AP cost. Targets occasionally get knocked down
Scoped weapons have 75% less AP cost. Targets occasionally get knocked down. Scoped weapons do 25% more damage

name: Penetrator
description: Ballistic weapons ignore armor and can penetrate cover.

ranks.description: Ballistic weapons ignore 25% of armor
Ballistic weapons ignore 50% of armor. Can penetrate one layer of cover
Ballistic weapons ignore 75% of armor. Can penetrate one layer of cover. Critical hits penetrate all cover

name: Concentrated Fire
description: Hitting the same target repeatedly in VATS increases accuracy and damage.

ranks.description: Each consecutive hit on the same target in VATS increases accuracy by 20%
Each consecutive hit on the same target in VATS increases accuracy by 20%. Accuracy caps at 95%
Each consecutive hit on the same target in VATS increases accuracy by 20%. Accuracy caps at 95%. Targets take 20% more damage

name: Toughness
description: You take less damage from all sources.

ranks.description: You take 10% less damage
You take 20% less damage
You take 30% less damage
You take 40% less damage
You take 50% less damage

name: Lead Belly
description: You take less radiation damage from food and water.

ranks.description: You take 50% less radiation from food and water
You take 66% less radiation from food and water
You take 75% less radiation from food and water. You can eat any food without radiation

name: Lifegiver
description: Gain more HP and regenerate health out of combat.

ranks.description: You gain +30 HP
You gain +60 HP
You gain +90 HP. Out of combat, regenerate 1% health every 2 seconds

name: Chem Resistant
description: Chems are less addictive.

ranks.description: Chems are 50% less addictive
Chems are 100% less addictive

name: Aquaboy
description: You can breathe underwater and move faster in water.

ranks.description: You can breathe underwater
You can breathe underwater. You move faster in water

name: Rad Resistant
description: You gain radiation resistance.

ranks.description: You gain +10 Radiation Resistance
You gain +20 Radiation Resistance
You gain +30 Radiation Resistance
You gain +40 Radiation Resistance
You gain +50 Radiation Resistance

name: Adamantium Skeleton
description: You take less limb damage.

ranks.description: You take 25% less limb damage
You take 50% less limb damage
You take 75% less limb damage
You take 100% less limb damage
You take 100% less limb damage. Limbs never cripple

name: Cannibal
description: Eating corpses restores health.

ranks.description: Eating human and creature corpses restores 25 HP
Eating human and creature corpses restores 25 HP. Can eat more corpse types
Eating human and creature corpses restores 50 HP. Can eat more corpse types

name: Ghoulish
description: Radiation restores health instead of harming you.

ranks.description: Radiation restores 50% of damage as health
Radiation restores 100% of damage as health
Radiation restores 150% of damage as health

name: Solar Powered
description: Gain bonuses during the day.

ranks.description: During the day, gain +1 Strength and +1 Endurance. Radiation is reduced by 50%
During the day, gain +2 Strength and +2 Endurance. Radiation is reduced by 50%

name: Cap Collector
description: Vendors have more caps and you get better prices.

ranks.description: Vendors have 10% more caps. Prices are 10% better
Vendors have 20% more caps. Prices are 20% better
Vendors have 30% more caps. Prices are 25% better

name: Black Widow/Lady Killer
description: Do more damage to the opposite sex and gain dialogue options.

ranks.description: Do 25% more damage to the opposite sex. Gain dialogue options
Do 50% more damage to the opposite sex. Gain dialogue options
Do 75% more damage to the opposite sex. Gain dialogue options

name: Lone Wanderer
description: You take less damage and carry more without a companion.

ranks.description: Without a companion, take 25% less damage
Without a companion, take 25% less damage. Carry capacity increased by 50 lbs
Without a companion, take 50% less damage. Carry capacity increased by 100 lbs

name: Attack Dog
description: Your dog does more damage and can hold enemies.

ranks.description: Your dog does 25% more damage. Can hold enemies in combat
Your dog does 50% more damage. Can hold enemies in combat
Your dog does 75% more damage. Can hold and cripple enemies in combat

name: Animal Friend
description: You can pacify animals.

ranks.description: You can pacify animals below your level
You can pacify animals at or below your level
You can pacify any animal. Can command them to attack

name: Local Leader
description: You can establish supply lines and build trading posts.

ranks.description: You can establish supply lines between settlements
You can establish supply lines and build trading posts in settlements

name: Party Boy
description: Alcohol is more effective and less addictive.

ranks.description: Alcohol is 25% more effective. Alcohol is 50% less addictive
Alcohol is 50% more effective. Alcohol is 100% less addictive

name: Inspirational
description: Your companions do more damage and carry more.

ranks.description: Your companions do 25% more damage
Your companions do 25% more damage. Companions carry capacity increased by 50 lbs

name: Wasteland Whisperer
description: You can pacify humanoid creatures.

ranks.description: You can pacify humanoid creatures below your level
You can pacify humanoid creatures at or below your level
You can pacify any humanoid creature. Can command them to attack

name: Intimidation
description: Enemies are easier to pacify.

ranks.description: Enemies below your level are easier to pacify
Enemies at or below your level are easier to pacify
Any enemy can be pacified. Can command them to attack

name: Hacker
description: You can hack terminals and unlock computer systems.

ranks.description: You can hack Novice terminals
You can hack Advanced terminals
You can hack Expert terminals
You can hack Master terminals. Terminals are easier to hack

name: Scrapper
description: You get more materials when scrapping weapons and armor.

ranks.description: You get more materials when scrapping weapons and armor
You get even more materials when scrapping. Rare materials are more common

name: Chemist
description: You can craft and modify chems.

ranks.description: You can craft chems
You can craft chems. Chems are 25% more potent
You can craft chems. Chems are 50% more potent
You can craft chems. Chems are 100% more potent

description: You can craft and modify guns.

ranks.description: You can craft and modify guns
You can craft and modify guns. Guns are 25% more effective
You can craft and modify guns. Guns are 50% more effective
You can craft and modify guns. Guns are 100% more effective

Stimpaks restore 60% health. RadAway removes 60% radiation
Stimpaks restore 80% health. RadAway removes 80% radiation
Stimpaks restore 100% health. RadAway removes 100% radiation

description: You can craft and modify energy weapons.

ranks.description: You can craft and modify energy weapons
You can craft and modify energy weapons. Energy weapons are 25% more effective
You can craft and modify energy weapons. Energy weapons are 50% more effective
You can craft and modify energy weapons. Energy weapons are 100% more effective

name: Robotics Expert
description: You can hack and control robots.

ranks.description: You can hack robots below your level
You can hack robots at or below your level
You can hack any robot. Can command them to attack

description: Fusion cores last longer and radiation weapons are more effective.

ranks.description: Fusion cores last 25% longer
Fusion cores last 50% longer. Radiation weapons do 50% more damage
Fusion cores last 100% longer. Radiation weapons do 100% more damage. Can eject fusion cores as grenades

name: Nerd Rage
description: When your health is low, gain bonuses to damage and defense.

ranks.description: Below 25% health, gain +20 Damage and +20 Damage Resistance
Below 25% health, gain +40 Damage and +40 Damage Resistance
Below 25% health, gain +60 Damage and +60 Damage Resistance. Time slows down

name: V.A.N.S.
description: See quest markers and waypoints without a compass.

ranks.description: Hold VATS button to see quest markers and waypoints on screen

name: Gunslinger
description: Pistols do more damage and have better range.

ranks.description: Pistols do 20% more damage
Pistols do 40% more damage. Pistols have 25% more range
Pistols do 60% more damage. Pistols have 50% more range

Pistols do 100% more damage. Pistols have 50% more range

description: Automatic rifles do more damage and have better accuracy.

Automatic rifles do 60% more damage. Hip-fire spread is reduced by 50%
Automatic rifles do 80% more damage. Hip-fire spread is reduced by 50%
Automatic rifles do 100% more damage. Hip-fire spread is reduced by 50%

You are 100% harder to detect while sneaking. You can move at normal speed while sneaking

description: Sneak attacks with silenced weapons do more damage.

ranks.description: Silenced weapons do 25% more sneak attack damage

Silenced weapons do 100% more sneak attack damage. Can kill sleeping targets silently

name: Action Boy
description: Gain more action points and regenerate them faster.

ranks.description: Gain +15 Action Points. Action Points regenerate 25% faster
Gain +30 Action Points. Action Points regenerate 50% faster

description: Gain damage and energy resistance while moving.

ranks.description: While moving, gain +25 Damage and Energy Resistance
While moving, gain +50 Damage and Energy Resistance
While moving, gain +75 Damage and Energy Resistance

name: Ninja
description: Sneak attacks do more damage.

ranks.description: Sneak attacks do 25% more damage
Sneak attacks do 50% more damage
Sneak attacks do 100% more damage

name: Quick Hands
description: Reload speed is faster.

ranks.description: Reload speed is 25% faster
Reload speed is 50% faster. Can reload while moving

name: Blitz
description: VATS melee attacks have increased range and cost less AP.

ranks.description: VATS melee attacks have 25% more range. Cost 25% less AP
VATS melee attacks have 50% more range. Cost 25% less AP
VATS melee attacks have 75% more range. Cost 50% less AP

description: VATS gun attacks hit multiple targets.

ranks.description: VATS gun attacks can hit an additional target
VATS gun attacks can hit 2 additional targets
VATS gun attacks can hit 3 additional targets. Each hit does 25% more damage
VATS gun attacks can hit 4 additional targets. Each hit does 25% more damage

name: Fortune Finder
description: You find more caps in containers.

ranks.description: You find 25% more caps in containers
You find 50% more caps in containers

You find 100% more caps in containers

ranks.description: You find 25% more ammo in containers
You find 50% more ammo in containers
You find 75% more ammo in containers
You find 100% more ammo in containers

name: Bloody Mess
description: All weapons do more damage and kills can gib enemies.

ranks.description: All weapons do 5% more damage. 5% chance to gib enemies
All weapons do 10% more damage. 5% chance to gib enemies

name: Mysterious Stranger

ranks.description: Mysterious Stranger appears in VATS to kill an enemy
Mysterious Stranger appears in VATS to kill an enemy. Appears more often
Mysterious Stranger appears in VATS to kill an enemy. Appears more often. Fills your critical meter

ranks.description: Random chance to gain 3x XP
Random chance to gain 3x XP. Chance increases with lower Intelligence
Random chance to gain 3x XP. Chance increases with lower Intelligence. Applies to quest XP

description: Critical hits do more damage.

ranks.description: Critical hits do 50% more damage
Critical hits do 100% more damage

ranks.description: Gain an extra critical hit. Can store up to 4 crits
Gain an extra critical hit. Can store up to 4 crits. Chance to gain crit on crit
Gain an extra critical hit. Can store up to 4 crits. Chance to gain crit on crit. Crits refill faster

name: Grim Reaper's Sprint
description: Kills restore action points.

ranks.description: Kills restore 15 action points
Kills restore 30 action points
Kills restore all action points

name: Four Leaf Clover
description: Chance to gain a critical hit when using VATS.

ranks.description: 10% chance to gain a critical hit when using VATS
15% chance to gain a critical hit when using VATS
20% chance to gain a critical hit when using VATS
25% chance to gain a critical hit when using VATS

name: Ricochet
description: Chance to reflect ranged damage back at attackers.
